description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches pip files in $HOME/.cache/pip using a cache key of $CI_PROJECT_NAME and includes the SAST template from thelabnyc/gitlab-ci-templates/ci/sast.gitlab-ci.yml. Define a single stage named test. Add three jobs: test_python35 using the python:3.5 image that runs pip install tox then tox -e 'py35-django{111,200,210}'; test_python36 using the python:3.6 image that runs pip install tox then tox -e 'py36-django{111,200,210}'; and test_python37 using the python:3.7 image that runs pip install tox then tox -e 'py37-django{200,210}'. All jobs belong to the test stage and have no additional rules.
